description_long: This is a modern, single-story house set on a rectangular grassy plot with two large, leafy trees flanking the structure. The house features a flat roof and a clean, minimalist white exterior with large windows and a simple, rectangular form. The front entryway is accessed by a short path of stepping stones leading to a single door, and there is a small patio area visible at the rear. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large panes providing ample natural light to the interior. The surrounding landscape is open, with neatly trimmed grass and no visible fencing or barriers. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist design, set on a grassy plot with two large trees and a stone path entry.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, stepping stone path, and two large trees framing the house.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat roof, a small patio area, and the back of the house with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Side view with large windows and one tree partially obscuring the house, emphasizing the open grassy yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the patio area, side windows, and the second tree, with the entry path visible in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple single door with a short stone path, no porch or overhang, minimalistic and unadorned
